nodes.label: PM-as-data layer
nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/FABLED 2/4 - FABLED 2 — Future Enhancements.md
nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: Standard frontmatter preserves human-first markdown while enabling machine queries over status, verification, severity, and ownership.

nodes.label: Claims-versus-reality reconciliation report
nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/FABLED 2/4 - FABLED 2 — Future Enhancements.md
nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: Automated comparison of documentation claims with test, file, route, and LOC evidence closes the authority-staleness class.

nodes.label: Automatic module delta from git

nodes.label: Flat decision log
nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/FABLED 2/4 - FABLED 2 — Future Enhancements.md
nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: Centralizing decision, reason, enforcement point, and revisit condition prevents future humans and agents from re-litigating buried decisions.

nodes.label: PM signals delivered through ERA
nodes.source_file: ERA Notes/10 - Project Management/FABLED 2/4 - FABLED 2 — Future Enhancements.md
nodes.author: Elio
nodes.rationale: The app can dogfood its proactive thesis by surfacing due hygiene, stale authority, and campaign revisit signals.
